pages.text:
**NOTARIAL CERTIFICATE OF FAMILY COMPOSITION**

**Document ID:** certificate_016
**Type:** Notarial Certificate / Family Composition Certificate
**Date of Certificate:** 19 April 2024
**Place of Issue:** Bruges, Belgium
**Notary:** Meester Katrien Lemaire, Bruges

---

**I. AUTHORITY**
I, Meester Katrien Lemaire, Notary Public, duly registered in the district of Bruges, Belgium, hereby certify the following
regarding the family composition of the individuals listed below. This certificate is prepared for purposes of estate and
patrimonial planning.

---

**II. FAMILY COMPOSITION**

| Name                         | Date of Birth    | Relationship                                    |
|----------------------------|------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| Hendrik Janssen             | 15 March 1948    | Father                                           |
| Maria Janssen-De Vos       | 22 July 1951     | Mother                                           |
| Thomas Janssen              | 9 November 1972   | Son of Hendrik Janssen and Maria Janssen-De Vos |
| Sarah Janssen-Peeters      | 4 February 1975   | Spouse of Thomas Janssen                        |
| Emma Janssen                | 28 August 1976    | Daughter of Hendrik Janssen and Maria Janssen-De Vos |
| Lucas Vermeer               | 12 January 1974   | Spouse of Emma Janssen                          |
| Sophie Janssen              | 6 June 1998       | Daughter of Thomas Janssen and Sarah Janssen-Peeters, and
granddaughter of Hendrik Janssen and Maria Janssen-De Vos |

---

**III. RELATIONSHIP STATEMENTS**
1. Hendrik Janssen and Maria Janssen-De Vos are married and are the parents of Thomas Janssen and Emma
Janssen.
2. Thomas Janssen is the spouse of Sarah Janssen-Peeters, and they have one child, Sophie Janssen.
3. Emma Janssen is married to Lucas Vermeer.

**IV. PURPOSE OF CERTIFICATE**
This certificate is issued to provide an official record of the family relationships for the purposes of estate and patrimonial
planning. It serves to clarify the lineal descent and marital connections pertinent to the estate of Hendrik Janssen and
Maria Janssen-De Vos, as well as their descendants.

---

**V. SIGNATURE AND SEAL**
This certificate has been executed on the date first above written and is sealed with the official seal of the notary.

---

**In witness whereof**, I have affixed my signature and notarial seal.

**[Notary Seal]**
**Meester Katrien Lemaire**
Notary Public in Bruges, Belgium

---

This document is valid and effective upon issuance and may be utilized as a formal record for all relevant legal and
administrative purposes regarding estate planning and familial composition.
